mapper.insert: insert into sc_resource_comment_like(comment_id, user_id, create_by, create_time) values(#{commentId}, #{userId}, #{createBy}, sysdate())
mapper.delete: delete from sc_resource_comment_like where comment_id = #{param1} and user_id = #{param2}
mapper.select: select count(1) from sc_resource_comment_like where comment_id = #{commentId}
